subcodes.first_line: When the Promise came to pass and the Promised One appeared, the divines rose up against Him and turned the people away from the path of God, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا جاء الوعد و اتی الموعود اعترض علیه العلماء و صدوا الناس عن صراط الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action
